title: polyscias obtusa
intro: Polyscias obtusa, also known as the Elephant Ear or Polyscias, is a tropical plant native to the Pacific Islands, characterized by its large, glossy leaves. The medicinal properties of Polyscias obtusa lie in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and viruses, making it a potential treatment for various infections. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and reduce inflammation, making it a valuable addition to traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Polyscias obtusa typically involve infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or decoction, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
